allow: Bash(mysql -u root -proot123 -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS cugcoding DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4;")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/posts -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"title":"CUGCoding 论坛测试","content":"这是一篇**Markdown**测试文章。"}' -b /tmp/cookies2.txt)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/posts -H 'Content-Type: application/json; charset=UTF-8' --data-raw '{"title":"CUGCoding Forum Test","content":"This is a **Markdown** test post."}' -b /tmp/cookies2.txt)
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(data[:2], indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/posts/5/comments -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-raw '{"content":"Great post! This is a comment."}' -b /tmp/cookies2.txt)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Title:', data['title']\); print\('Comments:', len\(data['comments']\)\); [print\(f'  - {c[\\"username\\"]}: {c[\\"content\\"]}'\) for c in data['comments']]")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/posts/4/comments -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-raw '{"content":"Great post! This is a comment."}' -b /tmp/cookies2.txt)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Title:', data['title']\); print\('Author:', data['authorName']\); print\('Comments:', len\(data['comments']\)\); [print\(f'  - {c[\\"username\\"]}: {c[\\"content\\"]}'\) for c in data['comments']]")
